episodes.title: Rep. Dean on Acting AG Todd Blanche's Failure to Protect Survivors of Epstein
episodes.description: June 4, 2026 | Congresswoman Madeleine Dean (PA-04) joins MS Now's The Last Word with Lawrence O'Donnell to discuss Acting AG Todd Blanche's failure to protect survivors of Epstein.

episodes.title: Madeleine Dean on the DOJ's Failure to Protect Epstein Survivors
episodes.description: June 2, 2026 | Congresswoman Madeleine Dean (PA-04) joins CNN's The Lead with Jake Tapper to discuss her questioning of Acting AG Todd Blanche before the House Appropriations Committee — a hearing covering the walk-back of the President's $1.6 Billion slush fund for January 6 rioters and the DOJ's failure to protect Epstein survivors.

episodes.title: Rep. Dean Questions Sec. Lutnick's Past Ties to Epstein
episodes.description: April 23, 2026 | Congresswoman Madeleine Dean (PA-04) joins MS NOW's Deadline White House with Nicolle Wallace to recap her questioning of Secretary of Commerce Howard Lutnick's ties to Jeffrey Epstein during his hearing before the House Appropriations Committee.
